explanation: Insertion: Replaced numeric IP address with a domain name to avoid matching the Sigma rule's IP pattern.
Substitution: Replaced the numeric IP address with a domain name and used a long option (-i) instead of a short one (/i) to avoid matching the Sigma rule's IP pattern.
Recoding: Changed the protocol from HTTP to file:// and used a local path to avoid matching the Sigma rule's IP pattern.
